name: Process Cohesion & Decomposition Agent
description: Two-job agent for business process structure. Job 1: decompose a street-view map into a candidate sub-process list with value-stream ownership grid (run once at epic kickoff). Job 2 (opt-in only, requires explicit user approval): check whether an existing business process still holds together as a coherent end-to-end journey after mid-epic changes.
author: dropkit

input.arguments: for Job 1: street-view map description + Business Process name/description; for Job 2 (with explicit approval): Business Process page + Sub-Process pages + Ubiquitous Language document
